headline: MarketBeat Week in Review – 03/16 - 03/20
summary: This week, all the major indexes closed below their 200-day moving averages, meaning investors may have to wait a little longer for the stock selloff to end

headline: KEYSIGHT TECHNOLOGIES INC (NYSE:KEYS) Fits the Minervini Trend Template with Strong Growth Momentum
summary: KEYS stock exemplifies a high-growth momentum strategy, combining strong technical trends with accelerating earnings and sales fundamentals.
